goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants.
You are looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should serve 'international' food and should be in the 'moderate' price range.
The restaurant should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free wifi' and should 'include free parking'.
The hotel should have 'a star of 3'.
Make sure you get 'phone number', 'hotel type', and 'area'.
You also want to book a 'taxi' to commute between the two places.
You want to leave the 'hotel' by '21:00'.
Make sure you get 'contact number' and 'car type'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should serve international food and should be in the moderate price range
The restaurant should be in the centre
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free wifi and should include free parking
The hotel should have a star of 3
Make sure you get phone number, hotel type, and area
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to leave the hotel by 21:00
Make sure you get contact number and car type
